0 - Xi 0 exploit
1 - Xi 0.1 small explore
2 - Xi 0.5medium explore
3 - Xi 20 higher Explore
4 - UCB k 0.1 exploit
5 - UCB k 5 balanced
6 - UCB k 10 medium explore
7 - UCB k 20 extreme Explore

F1: {'alpha': 1e-08, 'kernel': Matern(length_scale=1, nu=0.5), 'n_restarts_optimizer': 10}
